List of NCAA Division II men's soccer programs

The following is a list of NCAA Division II men's soccer programs.

Institution Location Conference Nickname
Adelphi University[1] Garden City, New York Northeast-10 Conference Panthers
Barry University Miami Shores, Florida Sunshine State Conference Buccaneers
Cal State LA Los Angeles, California California Collegiate Athletic Association Golden Eagles
Saint Leo University St. Leo, FL Sunshine State Conference Lions
Adelphi University Garden City, New York Northeast-10 Conference Panthers
